description_long: This is a compact, modern filing cabinet with a matte black finish, featuring two spacious drawers and an open shelf at the top. The front face displays two horizontal bar handles, each attached to a drawer, providing easy access. The open shelf above the drawers is suitable for storing documents or small office supplies for quick access. The sides and back are plain, with no visible features or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist design. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from engineered wood or laminate, with metal handles and internal hardware. Its sturdy, boxy form and flat top surface make it suitable for supporting additional items such as printers or office equipment.
description: A matte black filing cabinet with two drawers, bar handles, and an open top shelf, designed for modern office or urban use. Its minimalist, boxy design features a flat top and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with bar handles and an open shelf above them.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, featureless surface with subtle panel seams.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely flat, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain surface and no visible features.
